ValidationRule.description: Must choose Car if Expense Sub Type = Car (Company)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
RecordType.DeveloperName ="CarTravel", ISPICKVAL( ExpenseSubType__c ,"CarCompany"), ISBLANK( Car__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose the car used for this expense. (EC010)
